# Configuration

## Why this folder exists

Build tooling, generated types, and deployment manifests — not runtime app code.

## What is here

- build/ — eslint, tsconfig, playwright, postcss
- database/types/ — generated Supabase types
- deployment/, environment/
- route-contract.json — expected routes and classifications

---
*Generated by `site/scripts/generate-contents-md.mjs` — edit manifest, then `pnpm run docs:sync:all` from repo root.*
